creator: oskar.holmlund@ohdata.se
text:
(In reply to Gleb Smirnoff from comment #1)

Hi Gleb,

Can confirm that it works as described in the handbook on a 14-alpha3 system
 FreeBSD 14.0-ALPHA3 amd64 1400097 #0 stable/14-n265022-2af9390e54ed: Fri Aug 25 05:45:56 UTC 2023

On a more recent 15-current it doesnt.
FreeBSD 15.0-CURRENT #0 main-n268802-3705d679a634: Fri Mar 15 09:04:23 CET 2024 

On 15-current it works to escape the loop by issue 'quit' from the loader shell.
